data.title: ECD Auto Design unveils a light blue Land Rover Defender 110 adorned with pelican emblems for a custom client project.
data.description: A unique project called Pelican involves a nautical blue Land Rover Defender 110 customized with a distinctive pelican emblem featured prominently on the vehicle. This special vehicle was custom-built for a specific client, showcasing a one-of-a-kind design.

data.title: Lennox L40 Smart Thermostat wins "Smart Thermostat of the Year" award for its innovative features. DALLAS, Jan. 20, 2026
data.description: Recently, the Lennox® L40 Smart Thermostat was honored in the IoT Breakthrough Awards for its connectivity functions. The thermostat offers features like geo-fencing, personalized scheduling, configuration guidance, and system insight utilities. Lennox, a company listed as LII on NYSE, made this announcement in Dallas on January 20, 2026.

data.title: Pentagon awards $151 billion contract ceiling to 2,400 firms to boost U.S. defense capabilities.
data.description: VisionWave Holdings, Inc. announced today that the Pentagon has granted more than 2,400 companies authorization to compete for a contract worth up to $151 billion[1] aimed at enhancing the U.S. industrial sector for the Golden Dome missile defense system. The contract ceiling represents a substantial investment in bolstering the nation's defense capabilities.

data.title: CIMG Inc.'s Huo Mao brand wins 2025 China New Consumption Craftsmanship Heritage Award per iiMedia Research. Nasdaq: IMG.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, CIMG Inc., a company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol IMG, announced its focus on digital health and sales development. CIMG utilizes technology and marketing networks to boost sales growth and commercial value for its business partners.

data.title: Southeastern acquires Sunbelt to enhance printing capabilities, focusing on dimensional and structural prints.
data.description: A company based in Hialeah, Florida, Southeastern, has recently acquired Sunbelt to enhance its capabilities in dimensional and structural printing. This acquisition is expected to significantly boost Southeastern's production volume by approximately 20% and expand its reach to new markets. Additionally, it will bring the total number of employees in Southeastern to over 500, solidifying its position as a key player in the printing industry.

data.title: Terreno Realty Corp completes development in Hialeah, FL. Limited details provided.
data.description: Terreno Realty Corporation has announced the completion of a development project in Hialeah, Florida. The new property spans a total of [insert size/area in square feet or meters]. This marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue to expand their presence in the area. This development is part of Terreno Realty Corporation's ongoing efforts to enhance their portfolio and meet the increasing demand for commercial real estate in Hialeah.

data.title: VGTel, Inc. reveals patent-pending sensing tech post govt conference talks.
data.description: VGTel, Inc. has unveiled their innovative advanced sensing technology that is currently patent-pending. This milestone comes after productive discussions with government officials during a strategic conference. The company's new technology is expected to revolutionize the industry, with impressive capabilities that set it apart from existing solutions. This development showcases VGTel, Inc.'s commitment to innovation and progress in the technology sector.

data.title: Suave Brands and Elida Beauty merge to form Evermark, with $1.9 billion in annual retail sales. Leading global personal care platform.
data.description: A new company named Evermark, LLC has been formed through the merger of Suave Brands Company and Elida Beauty, leading to a combined total of approximately $1.9 billion in annual retail sales. The merger was officially completed on January 20, 2026, in New York City. The two companies brought together significant brands to establish Evermark, LLC.

data.title: Ascensus hits $300B in 529 Plan assets, solidifying leadership in education savings and state programs.
data.description: Ascensus has reaffirmed its top position in education savings and ongoing expansion in state-sponsored programs with a recent achievement. Based in Dresher, Pennsylvania, the company announced on January 20, 2026 that it has exceeded $300 billion in assets under management. Ascensus is recognized as the premier independent technology and service provider for savings plans throughout the United States.

data.title: Balena gets growth investment from LoneTree Capital to enhance Edge AI and IoT fleet management.
data.description: Balena, a prominent platform for deploying, managing, and scaling edge computing and AI devices, has disclosed receiving a significant growth investment from LoneTree Capital based in New York. This strategic partnership aims to fuel Balena's product innovation, prioritizing Edge AI workloads and enhancing security measures to address changing compliance requirements. The collaboration will also facilitate increased support for customer success and worldwide fleet assistance. Established in 2X (not specified in the text).

data.title: Crecer aids small businesses combat retirement savings crisis; only 40% of small business employees have retirement accounts.
data.description: In Miami, Crecer, an SEC Registered Investment Advisor, has introduced an online service simplifying retirement savings for small business owners to support their employees. The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics reported in March 2025 that a mere 40% of small business employees (less than 100 employees) have a retirement account. The primary issue lies in the administrative challenges and expenses encountered by business owners in providing retirement benefits to their employees.

data.title: CSC's report shows unicorns lead Global 2000 firms in 5 of 8 domain security categories.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, CSC, a reputable domain registrar, has unveiled its Domain Security Report 2026. The report highlights that unicorns, which are privately owned startups or innovative companies valued at over $1 billion, outperform Forbes Global 2000 companies in five out of eight domain security capabilities. This signifies the superior domain security posture of unicorns compared to established corporations. The findings showcase that unicorns are excelling in protecting themselves against brand, fraud, domain, and domain name system (DNS) threats. This indicates a strong emphasis on cybersecurity within the unicorn ecosystem. The report sheds light on the evolving landscape of domain security, with unicorns emerging as leaders in this area compared to traditional industry giants.

data.title: Intapp (NASDAQ: INTA) will report Q2 2026 financial results on Feb 3, 2026, hosting a webcast at 5 p.m. ET.
data.description: Intapp, Inc., a top global provider of AI-powered solutions for professionals at advisory, capital markets, and legal firms, is set to disclose its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on February 3, 2026. Management will conduct a webcast at 5 p.m. ET on the same day to review the company’s performance. Investors and others can access the webcast to gain insights on Intapp's business and financial results. Intapp's stock trades under the ticker symbol INTA on NASDAQ.

data.title: Pega releases AI tool Notes to Blueprint™ to streamline Lotus Notes transformation, accelerate cloud processes. #PEGA #AI.
data.description: In WALTHAM, Massachusetts, Pegasystems Inc. (NASDAQ: PEGA) has introduced Notes to Blueprint™, aimed at aiding organizations in converting obsolete legacy Lotus Notes applications into streamlined automated processes in the cloud. This offering, in conjunction with the AI capabilities of Pega Blueprint™, enables enterprises to assess their Lotus Notes portfolios, decommission dysfunctional workflows, and innovate them swiftly and effectively. This solution is intended to enhance operational efficiency and drive digital transformation for companies grappling with legacy systems.

data.title: Tavus releases Sparrow-1 model to enhance real-time voice and video AI conversation timing.
data.description: In San Francisco, Tavus, a company specializing in human computing, introduced Sparrow-1. This conversational-flow control model aims to enhance real-time voice and video AI by mimicking human response timing accurately. Sparrow-1 allows AI to decide optimal moments to listen, pause, or speak, aligning with human communication patterns. It ensures responses are timely yet natural. The model is accessible through Tavus APIs and products, emphasizing the shift towards lifelike AI with enhanced responsiveness.
